title: Creation
doc_html:
PART III.  CYPRESS-BLACK BAYOU RECREATION AND

WATER CONSERVATION DISTRICT

§2601.  Creation

The Cypress-Black Bayou Recreation and Water Conservation District is hereby created.  

Added by Acts 1958, No. 292, §1.

PART III.  CYPRESS-BLACK BAYOU RECREATION AND
WATER CONSERVATION DISTRICT
§2601.  Creation
The Cypress-Black Bayou Recreation and Water Conservation District is hereby created.
Added by Acts 1958, No. 292, §1.
